description_long: This object consists of a pair of black, semi-circular bands connected to two rectangular black housings, each attached to a flesh-toned, ear-shaped component. The ear-shaped parts have metallic prongs protruding from their inner sides, suggesting a function related to audio or electrical stimulation. The black bands appear to be flexible, possibly made of rubber or plastic, and are designed to fit over or around a head. The rectangular housings may contain electronic components or controls, and the metallic prongs are likely for contact with skin or another surface. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, with a focus on user comfort and secure placement. The color scheme is primarily black with flesh-toned and metallic accents.
description: A pair of black, semi-circular bands with rectangular housings and flesh-toned, ear-shaped components featuring metallic prongs, likely for audio or electrical contact.
description_view_0: Shows the open, semi-circular bands with the ear-shaped components and metallic prongs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Displays the object from the side, highlighting the thickness of the bands and the profile of the housings and ear-shaped parts.
description_view_2: Presents the rear view, emphasizing the metallic prongs and the back of the ear-shaped components.
description_view_3: Shows the opposite side profile, mirroring view 1 with a clear look at the band and housing structure.
